buildCommand: mkdir -p public_combined && cp *.html *.css *.js public_combined/ && cp -r js public_combined/js && cd admin && npm run build && cd .. && cp -r admin/dist public_combined/admin

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'
